task.en:
Using TextEdit, create a new document. If it opens in Rich Text mode, switch it to plain text first (Format menu → Make Plain Text, or ⇧⌘T). Type exactly the three lines below (no extra lines, no trailing blank line beyond a single newline at the end):
```
one
two
three
```
Save the file to `~/Desktop/notes.txt` (use ⌘S, name it `notes.txt`, choose the Desktop, and make sure the format is Plain Text).

pre_command: rm -f /Users/ec2-user/Desktop/notes.txt; osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command:
printf 'one
two
three
' > /tmp/_expected_notes.txt && [ -f /Users/ec2-user/Desktop/notes.txt ] && cmp -s /tmp/_expected_notes.txt /Users/ec2-user/Desktop/notes.txt && echo True || echo False
